moments.title: Spain Crowned World Cup Champions 2026
moments.blurb: Spain beat Argentina 1-0 in extra time on July 19 to win the FIFA World Cup 2026, with post-tournament analysis and celebrations still dominating discussions.

angles.name: Spain's Victory Lap
angles.copy: Spain are the FIFA World Cup 2026 champions! Five days on, are we still talking about that incredible final against Argentina? What were your standout moments from the tournament?

angles.name: Golden Boot Buzz
angles.copy: Kylian Mbappé took home the Golden Boot at the 2026 World Cup. Was he your player of the tournament?

moments.title: Commonwealth Games Underway in Glasgow
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games kicked off in Glasgow on July 23 and runs until August 2, featuring over 3,000 athletes from 74 nations.

angles.name: Glasgow Excitement
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are officially underway in Glasgow! Which events are you most excited to watch this week?

angles.name: Home Nation Hopes
angles.copy: Team Wales and Team Scotland are already making their mark at the Commonwealth Games! Catch highlights on S4C and BBC Alba.

moments.title: Tour de France Reaches Climax This Weekend
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France, which started on July 4, is reaching its final stages this weekend, concluding on Sunday, July 26.

angles.name: Final Stages
angles.copy: It's the final push! The Tour de France concludes on Sunday. Who are you backing for the yellow jersey this weekend?

moments.title: Premier League Pre-Season Friendlies Kick Off
moments.blurb: Premier League clubs are busy with pre-season friendlies this week and next, ahead of the 2026/27 season start on August 21.

angles.name: Football's Back!
angles.copy: Pre-season is in full swing! Which Premier League team are you most excited to see back in action this weekend?

angles.name: Local Team Action
angles.copy: Cardiff City take on Forest Green Rovers in a friendly this Saturday! Get ready for some local football action.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Wraps Up This Weekend
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival at Henham Park, Suffolk, runs from July 23-26, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Last Day of Latitude
angles.copy: It's the final day of Latitude Festival! Who's had the best set this weekend in Henham Park? Lewis Capaldi closes out tonight!

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is the perfect blend of music, comedy, and arts. What's been your highlight if you're there this weekend?

moments.title: Cardiff Castle Hosts Summer Concert Series
moments.blurb: Cardiff Castle continues its run of summer outdoor concerts this week and next, featuring Self Esteem, The Wombats & Sugababes, David Byrne, Biffy Clyro, The Streets, and Sex Pistols feat. Frank Carter.

angles.name: Cardiff Rocking Out
angles.copy: Cardiff Castle is buzzing with live music! Tonight it's Self Esteem, then The Wombats & Sugababes tomorrow, and David Byrne on Sunday! Who are you seeing?

angles.name: The Streets in Wales
angles.copy: Mike Skinner and The Streets hit Cardiff Castle next Friday (July 31)! Get ready for a massive night of garage and indie anthems.

moments.title: Major UK Festivals Approaching Next Week
moments.blurb: Y-Not Festival (Derbyshire), Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival (Scotland), and Camp Bestival Dorset all kick off next week, from July 30, featuring acts like The Libertines, The Human League, Bastille, and Fatboy Slim.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Just days until Y-Not, Belladrum, and Camp Bestival! Which festival are you heading to next week for your summer fix?

angles.name: Belladrum Lineup
angles.copy: Calling all Scottish music lovers! Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival kicks off next Thursday with James, The Human League, and Callum Beattie.

moments.title: New Music Friday: Shania Twain, Charli XCX, Snow Patrol
moments.blurb: Today's New Music Friday sees new albums from Shania Twain ('Little Miss Twain'), Charli XCX ('Music, Fashion, Film'), and a 20th-anniversary edition of Snow Patrol's 'Eyes Open'.

angles.name: Fresh Album Drops
angles.copy: Happy New Music Friday! What's first on your listening list: Shania Twain, Charli XCX, or the Snow Patrol 'Eyes Open' anniversary edition?

angles.name: Snow Patrol at 20
angles.copy: Snow Patrol's iconic album 'Eyes Open' gets a 20th-anniversary reissue today! What's your favourite track from the record?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Hold UK Singles Chart No.1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' remains at No.1 on the Official Singles Chart (week ending July 23), with World Cup anthems like Oasis's 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' surging back into the Top 5.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Still at No.1: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean with 'Rein Me In'! Are you loving this track, or is there something else you think deserves the top spot?

angles.name: World Cup Chart Impact
angles.copy: 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' back in the Top 5! The World Cup might be over, but the football anthems are still making waves on the charts.

moments.title: Bruno Mars Plays Wembley Stadium
moments.blurb: Bruno Mars performs at Wembley Stadium today, July 24, and tomorrow, July 25, as part of his highly anticipated return to London.

angles.name: Bruno Mars Live
angles.copy: 24K Magic in the air! Bruno Mars hits Wembley Stadium tonight and tomorrow. Who's heading to see the pop superstar live in London?

moments.title: Grace Jones Headlines Crystal Palace Park
moments.blurb: The legendary Grace Jones will perform at Crystal Palace Park on July 31 as part of the new Palace Bowl Presents festival series.

angles.name: Iconic Grace Jones
angles.copy: Get ready for an icon! Grace Jones takes over Crystal Palace Park next Friday. Who's excited to see the legendary performer?

moments.title: UK Summer Holidays in Full Swing
moments.blurb: Schools across England and Wales are now in their main summer holiday period, with many families planning or embarking on trips, leading to ongoing discussions about travel disruption and weather.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: Summer holidays are well and truly here for most schools in England and Wales! Where are you off to for your break this year?

angles.name: Travel Tips
angles.copy: With peak summer travel underway, the government is advising on ways to avoid disruption. Any top tips for smooth journeys?

moments.title: Mixed Weather Forecast, Potential for August Heat
moments.blurb: The UK is expecting changeable weather for late July and early August, with temperatures generally above average, and the Met Office hinting at potential for further heatwaves later in August.

angles.name: Summer Showers & Sunshine
angles.copy: Expect a mix of sunshine and showers this weekend and into next week. Perfect British summer, or are you hoping for more heat?

angles.name: August Heatwave Watch
angles.copy: After a very warm July, the Met Office says August could bring more heatwaves! Are you ready for another scorcher?

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez Turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for hits like 'Jenny from the Block' and 'On The Floor', celebrates her 57th birthday today.

angles.name: J.Lo's Birthday Jams
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only Jennifer Lopez! What's your favourite J.Lo track to get you on the dancefloor?

moments.title: Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire Turns 75
moments.blurb: Verdine White, the iconic bassist and founding member of Earth, Wind & Fire, celebrates his 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Legendary Bassist
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire! What's your favourite EWF hit?

moments.title: Mick Jagger Turns 83
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Icon
angles.copy: On Sunday, rock legend Mick Jagger turns 83! What's your all-time favourite Rolling Stones track to celebrate his birthday?

moments.title: Roger Taylor of Queen Turns 77
moments.blurb: Queen drummer Roger Taylor, co-writer of many of the band's hits, celebrates his 77th birthday this Sunday, July 26.

angles.name: Queen's Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to Queen's legendary drummer, Roger Taylor, this Sunday! What's your go-to Queen song?

moments.title: Stormzy Turns 33
moments.blurb: Grime superstar Stormzy, known for his impactful music and activism, celebrates his 33rd birthday on Sunday, July 26.

angles.name: Big Mike's Birthday
angles.copy: Big Mike turns 33 this Sunday! Wish Stormzy a Happy Birthday by dropping your favourite track of his in the comments.

moments.title: Geddy Lee of Rush Turns 73
moments.blurb: Geddy Lee, the iconic bassist and vocalist of progressive rock legends Rush, celebrates his 73rd birthday on Monday, July 29.

angles.name: Rush Legend
angles.copy: Happy 73rd Birthday to Rush's incredible Geddy Lee this Monday! What's your favourite Rush epic?

moments.title: Fatboy Slim Turns 63
moments.blurb: Norman Cook, better known as DJ and producer Fatboy Slim, the pioneer of big beat, celebrates his 63rd birthday on Thursday, July 31.

angles.name: Praise You, Fatboy Slim
angles.copy: Right here, right now! Happy 63rd Birthday to the one and only Fatboy Slim this Thursday! What's your favourite track to get the party started?

moments.title: Kate Bush Turns 68
moments.blurb: The iconic and influential singer-songwriter Kate Bush, known for her unique artistry and hits like 'Wuthering Heights', celebrates her 68th birthday on Wednesday, July 30.

angles.name: Wuthering Birthday
angles.copy: Running up that hill to wish Kate Bush a very Happy 68th Birthday this Wednesday! What's your all-time favourite song from the legendary artist?

moments.title: Joe Elliott of Def Leppard Turns 67
moments.blurb: Def Leppard's charismatic frontman, Joe Elliott, known for his powerful vocals on hits like 'Pour Some Sugar on Me', celebrates his 67th birthday on Saturday, August 1.

angles.name: Def Leppard's Main Man
angles.copy: Pour some birthday wishes on Joe Elliott! Def Leppard's legendary singer turns 67 this Saturday. What's your ultimate Def Leppard anthem?

moments.title: James Hetfield of Metallica Turns 63
moments.blurb: James Hetfield, the iconic frontman and rhythm guitarist of heavy metal giants Metallica, celebrates his 63rd birthday on Monday, August 3.

angles.name: Metal Master
angles.copy: Wishing a headbanging Happy 63rd Birthday to Metallica's James Hetfield this Monday! What's your favourite Metallica riff?

moments.title: T100 Triathlon London This Weekend
moments.blurb: The T100 Triathlon, a major event in the global triathlon series, takes place in London this weekend, July 25-26.

angles.name: London Triathlon Action
angles.copy: Get ready for some elite triathlon action! The T100 Triathlon is in London this weekend. Who are you cheering on?

moments.title: AIG Women's Open Begins Next Week
moments.blurb: The AIG Women's Open, one of golf's major championships, takes place at Royal Lytham and St Annes from July 29 to August 2, 2026.

angles.name: Women's Golf Major
angles.copy: The AIG Women's Open kicks off next week at Royal Lytham & St Annes! Who's your pick to win this major championship?
